auth.loginSubtitle: Access all business services from one place
auth.requiredCredentials: Please enter both email and password

dashboard.title: Shop Stop One - Business Platform
dashboard.subtitle: Unified workspace for company setup, legal advisory, accounting, HR, workspaces, and partnerships.
dashboard.modulesHint: Open any module to manage related records and workflows.

moduleDescriptions.services: Manage categories, pricing, and estimated delivery time.
moduleDescriptions.orders: Track multi-service orders and progress stages.
moduleDescriptions.billing: Issue invoices and record payment transactions.
moduleDescriptions.consultations: Handle free consultation requests from clients.
moduleDescriptions.providers: Manage provider profiles and service assignments.
moduleDescriptions.blog: Publish bilingual SEO articles and updates.

services.title: Services Module
services.description: Showcase service categories and maintain pricing, duration, and activation status.

orders.title: Orders Module
orders.description: Create multi-service orders and monitor each order lifecycle from pending to completion.

billing.title: Billing Module
billing.description: Generate invoices, register payments, and support multiple payment methods.

features.multipleMethods: Support bank, card, and online payments
features.dueTracking: Follow due dates and invoice status

consultations.title: Consultation Module
consultations.description: Receive free consultation requests and assign the right service path quickly.

providers.title: Providers Module
providers.description: Manage service partners and connect each provider to relevant services.

blog.title: Blog Module
blog.description: Publish bilingual articles to improve SEO and customer education.

admin.title: Admin Control Module
admin.description: Centralized control for users, roles, partners, and platform governance.
